title: Fluff Pack
description: Fluff pack is the pack used by Twitch Streamers "pimp_mommy420" and "nfld99" aka Mrs and Mr Fluff!
body:
## Fluff pack is the pack used by Twitch Streamers "pimp_mommy420" and "nfld99" aka Mrs.Fluff and Mr.Fluff!



this pack contains the following mods and data packs:
## Modrinth:
- Adorn
- Animatica
- Another Furniture
- AppleSkin
- Applied Energistics 2
- bad packets
- Better Mount HUD
- Bits And Chisels
- Borderless Mining
- Cloth Config API
- Continuity
- Cosmetica
- Crops Love Rain
- Culinaire
- Cull Leaves
- DashLoader
- Dawn API
- EasierVillagerTrading
- Enchant Menu
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Entity Texture Features [Fabric]
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FPS - Display
- Gamma Utils
- Global Packs
- Horse Stats Vanilla
- Immersive Portals
- Indium
- InfiniteVillagerTrading
- Instant Blocks
- Item Model Fix
- Kibe
- Lanterns Belong on Walls
- Light Overlay
- Lovely Snails
- Map In Slot
- MCA Reborn [Fabric/Forge]
- megane
- Mod Menu
- More Axolotl Variants Mod
- Mouse Tweaks
- Patchouli
- Perfect Accuracy
- Plushie-Mod
- Right-Click-Harvest
- Roughly Enough Items (REI)
- Sandwichable
- ShulkerBoxTooltip
- Sodium
- spark
- Status Effect Timer
- Tax Free Levels
- WagYourMinimap
- Wildfire's Female Gender Mod - Fabric & Forge
- WTHIT
- WTHIT Plugins
- Zoomify

## CurseForge:
- Architectury API (Fabric/Forge)
- Bookshelf
- Croptopia
- Diggus Maximus
- Enchantment Descriptions
- Fabric API

- KubeJS
- KubeJS UI
- Load My Resources [Fabric]
- Rhino
- WorldEdit
